question: At Universal Containers, junior sales reps struggle with objection handling and price negotiations for complex deals. The manager lacks time to guide each rep personally. The reps want a tool to practice pitches by simulating tough conversations and receive personalized feedback specific to their commerce opportunity. Which Salesforce solution should an Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Employee Coach
SDR Agent
Sales Coach
explanation: Sales Coach es la solucion correcta para que los reps practiquen manejo de objeciones y negociaciones mediante simulaciones de conversaciones dificiles y reciban feedback personalizado basado en sus oportunidades especificas. Esta disenado exactamente para el coaching y entrenamiento del equipo de ventas.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is assisting Universal Containers with troubleshooting an agent. The Agentforce Specialist notices that the agent is not using topic actions in the desired sequence, causing inconsistent outcomes. Which technique should the Agentforce Specialist recommend to ensure deterministic control over the order in which actions are executed?
options: Specify the large language model (LLM) provider and version.
Specify custom variables and filters.
Specify the order of actions.
explanation: Para asegurar control deterministico sobre el orden de ejecucion de acciones, se deben usar variables personalizadas y filtros condicionales. Los filtros en las acciones garantizan que cada accion solo se ejecute cuando las condiciones previas se cumplan, creando una secuencia determinista independiente del razonamiento del LLM.

question: What is an AI Specialist able to do when the “Enrich event logs with conversation data" setting in Einstein Agentforce or copilot  is enabled?
options: View the user click path that led to each Agentforce or copilot  action.
View session data including user Input and Agentforce or copilot  responses for sessions over the past 7 days.
Generate details reports on all Agentforce or copilot  conversations over any time period.
explanation: Al habilitar 'Enrich event logs with conversation data', el especialista puede ver los datos de sesión incluyendo inputs del usuario y respuestas del agente de los últimos 7 días. No se puede ver el click path completo del usuario ni generar informes históricos ilimitados con esta configuración.

question:
An AI Specialist is creating a custom action in Einstein Agentforce or copilot . 
Which option is available for the AI Specialist to choose for the custom Agentforce or copilot  action?
options: Apex trigger
SOQL
Flows
explanation: Para minimizar la latencia del retriever, priorizar filtros bien definidos que reduzcan el scope de búsqueda es más efectivo que modificar el bias de recencia o usar modo dinámico. Los filtros limitan los datos procesados en cada consulta, optimizando el tiempo de respuesta.

question: A developer is using the Salesforce CLI to deploy agent components from a sandbox to production. They recently made changes to several topics, instructions, and actions. Which metadata component should the developer include in their package.xml file that contains all of the topics and actions an agent will interact with?
options: genAiPlannerBundle
EinsteinAiPlannerBundle
BotBundle
explanation: genAiPlannerBundle es el componente de metadatos que contiene todos los topics y acciones con los que interactua un agente de Agentforce. Es el paquete correcto a incluir en el package.xml cuando se despliegan cambios a topics, instrucciones y acciones del agente via Salesforce CLI.

question: Leadership needs to populate a dynamic form field with a summary or description created by a large language model (LLM) to facilitate more productive conversations with customers. Leadership also wants to keep a human in the loop. Which prompt template type should the Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Field Generation
Record Summary
Sales Email
explanation: Field Generation es el tipo de prompt adecuado para generar texto con control humano.

question: Universal Containers wants to implement a customer verification process where sensitive account information can only be accessed after the customer passes identity verification. The agent must enforce this security rule deterministically without allowing the LLM to bypass the verification requirement. What should an Agentforce Specialist recommend as the best solution?
options: Use context variables to store verification status in the messaging session and configure the agent to check these variables through natural language prompts during each sensitive action.
Include detailed verification instructions in the agent's topic instructions explaining when customers should be verified and rely on the LLM to follow these guidelines consistently.

Create a custom variable IsCustomerVerified set by a verification action, then apply a conditional filter using the expression IsCustomerVerified equals true to all sensitive data actions, ensuring deterministic access control that the LLM can't alter.
explanation: Para control de acceso deterministico que el LLM no pueda alterar, se debe crear una variable personalizada IsCustomerVerified y aplicar filtros condicionales en todas las acciones sensibles. Depender del LLM para seguir instrucciones no es deterministico; los filtros condicionales en acciones son la unica garantia real.

question: Universal Containers has multiple Salesforce orgs, each with a unique customer service agent where a verification agent must pass customer identity data to downstream agents handling account modifications. The customer ID must remain secure and persistent across agent handoffs without exposure to LLM modification. What is the most appropriate configuration?
options: Implement a custom object to temporarily store verification status and have each agent query it via SOQL actions during execution.
Store customer identity information in conversation variables created by the first agent and have other agents read those same conversation variables.
Use the Agent API to start the downstream agent's session and pass the verified customer ID as a read-only context variable, ensuring security and preventing LLM alteration.
explanation: Para transferir datos de identidad de forma segura entre agentes en distintos orgs, la solucion correcta es usar el Agent API para iniciar la sesion del agente downstream y pasar el customer ID verificado como una context variable de solo lectura. Esto garantiza seguridad, persistencia y previene que el LLM modifique datos criticos de identidad.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is implementing Einstein Generative AI to improve customer insights and interactions. UC needs audit and feedback data to be accessible for reporting purposes.
What is a consideration for this requirement?
options: Storing this data requires Data Cloud to be provisioned.
Storing this data requires a custom object for data to be configured.
Storing this data requires Salesforce big objects.
explanation: Prompt Builder requiere el proceso completo: seleccionar el tipo de template, desarrollar en el workspace, agregar recursos de grounding dinámico con datos CRM, seleccionar el modelo y validar. Las otras opciones omiten pasos críticos como la selección del modelo o confunden el proceso con configuraciones incorrectas.

question:
Universal Containers’ data science team is hosting a generative large language model (LLM) on Amazon Web Services (AWS). 
What should the team use to access externally-hosted models in the Salesforce Platform?
options: Model Builder
App Builder
Agentforce or copilot  Builder
explanation: Model Builder es la herramienta de Salesforce para conectar y gestionar modelos LLM externos alojados en plataformas como AWS. App Builder es para interfaces de usuario y Agentforce Builder es para configurar agentes, no para registrar modelos externos en la plataforma.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) uses Salesforce Service Cloud to support its customers and agents handling cases. UC is considering implementing Einstein Agentforce or copilot  and extending Service Cloud to mobile users. 
When would Einstein Agentforce or copilot  implementation be most advantageous?
options: When the goal is to streamline customer support processes and improve response times
When the main objective is to enhance data security and compliance measures
When the focus is on optimizing marketing campaigns and strategies
explanation: Einstein Agentforce es más ventajoso cuando el objetivo es agilizar los procesos de soporte al cliente y mejorar los tiempos de respuesta, no para seguridad de datos ni optimización de marketing. Su valor principal está en la automatización inteligente de interacciones de servicio al cliente.

question:
An Al Specialist is tasked with configuring a generative model to create personalized sales emails using customer data stored in Salesforce. The AI Specialist has already fine-tuned a large language model (LLM) on the OpenAI platform. Security and data privacy are critical concerns for the client. 
How should the AI Specialist integrate the custom LLM into Salesforce?
options: Create an application of the custom LLM and embed it in Sales Cloud via iFrame.
Add the fine-tuned LLM in Einstein Studio Model Builder.
Enable model endpoint on OpenAl and make callouts to the model to generate emails.
explanation: Flex Templates permiten combinar múltiples recursos y objetos no relacionados como inputs, siendo ideales para casos complejos como propuestas de ventas. Las plantillas estándar están limitadas a un solo objeto, por lo que Flex es la solución correcta para datos de múltiples fuentes.

question: Universal Containers (UC) is tracking web activities in Data Cloud for a unified contact, and wants to use that in a prompt template to help extract insights from the data. Assuming that the Contact object is one of the objects associated with the prompt template, what is a valid way for UC to do this?
options: Call the prompt directly from Data Cloud with a web tracing activity included in the prompt definition.
Add the activity records as an enrichment related list to the Contact then pass the Contact into a prompt template workspace using related list grounding.
Create a prompt template that takes a list of all Data Cloud activity records as input to pass to the large language model (LLM).
explanation: La forma valida es agregar los registros de actividad web como una related list de enriquecimiento al Contact en Data Cloud, y luego pasar el Contact al workspace del prompt template usando grounding de related list. Esto permite incluir datos de actividad web del cliente en el contexto del prompt.

question: Universal Containers is rolling out a new generative AI initiative. Which Prompt Builder limitations should the Agentforce Specialist be aware of?
options: Rich text area fields are only supported in Flex template types.
Creations or updates to the prompt templates are not recorded in the Setup Audit Trail.
Custom objects are supported only for Flex template types.
explanation: Una limitacion importante de Prompt Builder es que las creaciones y actualizaciones de prompt templates no se registran en el Setup Audit Trail de Salesforce. Esto es relevante para organizaciones con requisitos estrictos de auditoria de cambios de configuracion.

question:
Northern Trail Outfitters (NTO) wants to configure Einstein Trust Layer in its production org but is unable to see the option on the Setup page.
After provisioning Data Cloud, which step must an Al Specialist take to make this option available to NTO?
options: Turn on Einstein Agentforce or copilot .
Turn on Einstein Generative AI.
Turn on Prompt Builder.
explanation: Agentforce Testing Center permite ejecutar pruebas sin consumir Einstein Requests, lo que lo hace ideal para pruebas exhaustivas sin costos adicionales. Sin embargo, las pruebas en producción sí pueden modificar datos CRM reales, por lo que se recomienda usar sandboxes.

question: Universal Containers is planning a marketing email about products that most closely match a customer's expressed interests. What should the company use to generate this email?
options: Custom sales email template which is grounded with interest and product information
Standard email marketing template using Apex or flows for matching interest in products
Standard email draft with Einstein and choose standard email template
explanation: Use plantilla de email de ventas personalizada con grounding e intereses.

question: What is the purpose of applying filters in a custom retriever configuration?
options: Filters narrow the search results by applying up to 10 conditions based on fields defined in the search index, thereby enhancing the relevancy of the content returned.
Filters automatically encrypt and mask sensitive fields in the search index to ensure that only non-confidential information is retrieved for public queries.
Filters reformat and aggregate multiple documents into a single summary output to streamline and unify retriever output for more efficient and accurate AI grounding.
explanation: Los filtros en un retriever personalizado limitan los resultados de busqueda aplicando hasta 10 condiciones basadas en campos del search index, mejorando la relevancia del contenido retornado. No cifran campos ni reformatean documentos; su funcion es acotar el scope de busqueda.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to ensure the effectiveness, reliability, and trust of its agents prior to deploying them in production. UC would like to efficiently test a large and repeatable number of utterances. What should the Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Deploy the agent in a QA sandbox environment and review the Utterance Analysis reports.
Create a CSV file with UC's test cases in Agentforce Testing Center using the testing template.
Leverage the Agent Large Language Model (LLM) UI and test with different utterances.
explanation: Crear un archivo CSV con casos de prueba en Agentforce Testing Center usando la plantilla de testing es el metodo mas eficiente para pruebas repetibles a gran escala. Permite automatizar la validacion de multiples utterances sin consumir Einstein Requests.

question: Universal Containers recently attended a major trade show and received thousands of new leads from event badge scans. Leadership wants to: qualify and nurture leads 24/7, provide accurate answers to prospect questions, automatically book meetings with qualified prospects, and free up reps to focus on closing deals. Which Agentforce capability should UC implement?
options: SDR Agent
Sales Coach
Commerce Agent
explanation: SDR Agent es la capacidad correcta para calificar y nutrir leads a escala de forma automatica 24/7, responder preguntas de prospectos y reservar reuniones con leads calificados. Esta disenado especificamente para el proceso de desarrollo de ventas y generacion de pipeline.

question: Which scenario best illustrates the use of Model Context Protocol (MCP) in an enterprise AI deployment?
options: A legal assistant agent using MCP to dynamically find a document classification API to analyze case files
A customer service agent engaging another agent in real-time conversation to resolve tickets
A sales agent discovering other agents' capabilities using Agent Cards
explanation: MCP se ilustra mejor con un agente que lo usa para descubrir y conectarse dinamicamente a herramientas y APIs externas, como una API de clasificacion de documentos. La opcion B describe A2A y la opcion C describe el uso de Agent Cards, que son parte del protocolo A2A para descubrimiento de capacidades entre agentes.

question: Which configuration must an Agentforce Specialist complete for users to access generative AI-enabled fields in the Salesforce mobile app?
options: Enable Mobile Generative AI.
Enable Mobile Prompt Responses.
Enable Dynamic Forms on Mobile.
explanation: Para que los campos generados por IA (Field Generation) sean accesibles en la app movil de Salesforce, se debe habilitar Dynamic Forms on Mobile. Sin esta configuracion, el icono sparkle de generacion de campo no aparece en la version movil.

question:
Universal Containers wants to utilize Einstein for Sales to help sales reps reach their sales quotas by providing Al-generated plans containing guidance and steps for closing deals. 
Which feature should the AI Specialist recommend to the sales team?
options: Find Similar Deals
Create Account Plan
Create Close Plan
explanation: Create Close Plan es la función de Einstein for Sales que genera planes con orientación y pasos específicos para cerrar oportunidades. Find Similar Deals busca deals parecidos y Create Account Plan es para planes de cuenta, no para guías de cierre de oportunidades específicas.

question: Universal Containers is building a digital shopping assistant that needs to dynamically generate product recommendations using information from the company's external product recommendation predictive model through APIs. Which Agentforce capability should make it easier for the agent to consume the external product recommendation tool?
options: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Hugging Face
Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol
explanation: Model Context Protocol (MCP) es la capacidad de Agentforce que permite al agente descubrir y consumir dinamicamente herramientas y APIs externas, como un modelo predictivo de recomendaciones de productos. MCP facilita la integracion con herramientas externas de forma estandarizada sin necesidad de codificacion custom.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to limit an agent's access to Knowledge articles while deploying Answer Questions with Knowledge action. How should UC achieve this?
options: Create separate Data Libraries for each category of Knowledge articles.
Use profile-based permissions to restrict Knowledge article visibility.
Assign Data Categories to Knowledge articles and define Data Category filters in the Agentforce Data Library.
explanation: Asignar Data Categories a los articulos de Knowledge y definir filtros de Data Category en la Agentforce Data Library es el metodo correcto para limitar el acceso del agente a articulos especificos, garantizando que solo se recuperen articulos relevantes y autorizados.

question: Which object stores the conversation transcript between the customer and the agent?
options: Case
Messaging End User
Messaging Session
explanation: Messaging Session guarda la transcripción de la conversación.

question: Universal Containers (UC) is rolling out an AI-powered support assistant to help customer service agents quickly retrieve relevant troubleshooting steps and policy guidelines from a large document repository. The documents are updated frequently and belong to different product lines. How should UC configure the retrieval system to ensure agents receive accurate, up-to-date, and product-specific information?
options: Index all documents in a single Data Library without filters and let the LLM determine relevance.
Create a custom retriever in Einstein Studio, and apply filters for publication date and product line.
Use only keyword search in the retriever to ensure exact matches for product-specific queries.
explanation: Crear un retriever personalizado con filtros por fecha de publicacion y linea de producto garantiza que el agente recupere informacion actualizada y especifica del producto relevante. Esto mejora la precision de las respuestas frente a un indice unico sin filtros.

question: Universal Containers needs to create a prompt template that provides a detailed product description based on the latest product data. The description will be used in marketing materials to ensure consistency and accuracy. Which prompt template type should UC use?
options: Record Summary
Sales Email
Field Generation
explanation: Field Generation es el tipo correcto para generar una descripcion de producto detallada que se almacene en un campo especifico del registro. Permite generar contenido de IA para un campo individual con revision humana, ideal para garantizar consistencia y precision en materiales de marketing.

question: Universal Containers aims to streamline the sales team's daily tasks by using AI. When considering these new workflows, which improvement requires the use of Prompt Builder?
options: Populate an AI-generated time-to-close estimation to opportunities
Populate an AI-generated summary field for sales contracts.
Populate an AI-generated lead score for new leads.
explanation: Poblar un campo de resumen generado por IA para contratos de ventas requiere Prompt Builder con un Field Generation template. Time-to-close y lead score son predicciones que usan modelos predictivos de Einstein, no Prompt Builder.

question: An Agentforce Specialist wants to troubleshoot an agent that is hallucinating weblinks. The agent has an action that uses a prompt template, which is using a knowledge retriever, to generate the output text. Which process is appropriate to find the root cause of the hallucination behavior?
options: Examine the topic name and classification description for hallucination guardrails.
Examine the prompt instructions and contents of the chunks shown in the resolved prompt output.
Examine the topic instructions and ensure the word 'ALWAYS' is used in the hallucination guardrails.
explanation: Para encontrar la causa raiz de alucinaciones de weblinks, se deben examinar las instrucciones del prompt y el contenido de los chunks mostrados en el output del prompt resuelto. Los chunks revelan que datos exactos se estan usando para grounding, lo que permite identificar si el contenido fuente contiene links incorrectos o si el LLM los esta inventando.

question: Universal Containers wants to use an AI agent to answer questions about warranties. Warranty information has already been uploaded as unstructured data in Data Cloud. When answering user questions, the results must be filterable by product line and ranked by recent updates. Which approach should the Agentforce Specialist implement?
options: Use the default retriever which automatically accounts for recency ranking.
Build a custom retriever in Einstein Studio with product line filters and recency ranking.
Apply semantic embeddings with default metadata filters to achieve the desired result.
explanation: Para filtrar por linea de producto y ordenar por actualizaciones recientes, se debe construir un retriever personalizado en Einstein Studio configurando esos filtros y el ranking de recencia especificamente. El retriever por defecto no ofrece ese nivel de configuracion personalizada.

question: How does an Agent respond when it can't understand the request or find any requested information?
options: With a general message asking the user to rephrase the request.
By escalating the conversation to a human agent automatically.
By returning an error message and closing the conversation.
explanation: Cuando el agente no puede entender la solicitud o no encuentra informacion relevante, responde con un mensaje general pidiendo al usuario que reformule su solicitud. Esto mantiene la conversacion activa y guia al usuario hacia una solicitud mas clara.

question: Universal Containers wants to allow its service agents to query the current fulfillment status of an order with natural language. There is an existing autolaunched flow to query the information from Oracle ERP, which is the system of record for the order fulfillment process. How should an Agentforce Specialist apply the power of conversational AI to this use case?
options: Create a custom Agent action which calls a flow.
Create a Flex prompt template in Prompt Builder.
Configure the Integration Flow Standard Action in Agent Builder.
explanation: Use un custom Agent action para invocar el flow autolaunch desde ERP.

question: What is automatically created when a custom search index is created in Data Cloud?
options: A retriever that shares the name of the custom search index.
A data stream and a data lake object.
A prompt template linked to the search index.
explanation: Cuando se crea un search index personalizado en Data Cloud, automaticamente se crea un retriever con el mismo nombre. Este retriever puede usarse directamente en prompts y agentes para realizar busquedas sobre el indice.

question: Universal Containers (UC) needs to save agents time with AI-generated case summaries. UC has implemented the Work Summary feature. What does Einstein consider when generating a summary?
options: Generation is grounded with conversation context, Knowledge articles, and cases.
Generation is grounded with existing conversation context only.
Generation is grounded with conversation context and Knowledge articles.
explanation: Einstein Work Summary genera el resumen usando como grounding el contexto de la conversacion actual y los articulos de Knowledge relevantes. No incluye otros casos historicos en el grounding; se centra en la conversacion actual enriquecida con el Knowledge disponible.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is tasked to optimize a business process flow by assigning actions to agents within the Salesforce Agentforce Platform. What is the correct method for the Agentforce Specialist to assign actions to an Agent?
options: Assign the action to a Topic first on Action Builder.
Assign the action to a Topic first in Agent Builder.
Assign the action to a Topic first on the Agent Actions detail page.
explanation: El metodo correcto es asignar la accion a un Topic primero en Action Builder, donde se gestionan las asociaciones entre acciones y topics del agente.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to leverage Generative AI Salesforce functionality to reduce Service Agent handling time by providing recommended replies based on the existing Knowledge articles. Which feature should UC implement?
options: Einstein Case Summaries.
Knowledge Replies.
Einstein Work Summaries.
explanation: Knowledge Replies proporciona respuestas recomendadas basadas en articulos de Knowledge existentes, reduciendo el tiempo que los agentes de servicio dedican a redactar respuestas a preguntas frecuentes.

question: What is true of Agentforce Testing Center?
options: Running tests risks modifying CRM data in a production environment.
Running tests does not consume Einstein Requests.
Agentforce Testing Center can only be used in a production environment.
explanation: El Testing Center puede modificar datos si se prueban en producción, lo que implica un riesgo real. Por eso, use sandbox o datos de prueba para pruebas de agente.

question: Universal Containers (UC) configured a new PDF file ingestion in Data Cloud with all the required fields, and also created the mapping and the search index. UC is now setting up the retriever and notices a required field is missing. How should UC resolve this?
options: Update the search index to include the desired field.
Modify the retriever's configuration to include the desired field.
Create a new custom Data Cloud object that includes the desired field.
explanation: Para agregar un campo faltante al retriever, se debe modificar la configuracion del retriever para incluir el campo deseado. El retriever necesita que el campo este referenciado directamente en su configuracion para poder usarlo en las busquedas.

question: Universal Containers wants to keep retrieval accurate as product documentation changes frequently. Which approach should the company implement?
options: Leave embedding unchanged even if content is updated.
Rebuild the search index.
Manually delete the stale data chunks.
explanation: Para mantener la precision del retrieval cuando la documentacion cambia frecuentemente, se debe reconstruir el search index. Esto regenera los embeddings vectoriales con el contenido actualizado, asegurando que las busquedas semanticas reflejen la informacion mas reciente.

question: Universal Containers built a Field Generation prompt template that worked for many records, but users are reporting random failures with token limit errors. What is the cause of the random nature of this error?
options: The template type needs to be switched to Flex to accommodate the variable amount of tokens generated by the prompt grounding.
The number of tokens that can be processed by the LLM varies with total user demand.
The number of tokens generated by the dynamic nature of the prompt template will vary by record.
explanation: Los tokens varían por registro, por eso el error es aleatorio.

question: When is the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol an appropriate communication choice?
options: When agents need to invoke third-party APIs
When agents need to access tools
When agents need to collaborate
explanation: El protocolo Agent-to-Agent (A2A) es apropiado cuando los agentes necesitan colaborar entre si, delegando tareas o compartiendo contexto. Para invocar APIs de terceros se usa MCP, y para acceder a herramientas tambien se usa MCP. A2A es especificamente para colaboracion y comunicacion entre agentes.

question:
An AI Specialist wants to use the related lists from an account in a custom prompt template. 
What should the AI Specialist consider when configuring the prompt template?
options: The text encoding (for example, UTF-8, ASCII) option
The maximum number of related list merge fields
The choice between XML and JSON rendering formats for the list
explanation: Query Records es la acción estándar del planner para solicitudes que implican listar o buscar registros según criterios como ubicación o tipo. Select Records y Fetch Records no son las acciones estándar para este tipo de consulta en el catálogo de Agentforce.

question:
An AI Specialist is tasked with configuring a generative model to create personalized sales emails using customer data stored in Salesforce. The AI Specialist has already fine-tuned a large language model (LLM) on the OpenAI platform. Security and data privacy are critical concerns for the client.
How should the AI Specialist integrate the custom LLM into Salesforce?
options: Add the fine-tuned LLM in Einstein Studio Model Builder.
Enable model endpoint on OpenAl and make callouts to the model to generate emails.
Create an application of the custom LLM and embed it in Sales Cloud via iFrame.
explanation: Para integrar un LLM personalizado fine-tuneado en OpenAI a Salesforce de forma segura, se debe usar Einstein Studio Model Builder para registrar y gestionar el modelo externo. Hacer callouts directos a OpenAI o incrustar con iFrame no proporciona las garantías de seguridad y control del Trust Layer.

question: After configuring and saving a Salesforce Agentforce Data Library (regardless of the data source), which components are automatically created and available in Data Cloud?
options: A data pipeline, an indexing engine, and a query processor.
A data connector, an analytics dashboard, and a workflow rule.
A data stream, a search index, and a retriever.
explanation: Crea un data stream, search index y retriever automáticamente.

question: What considerations should an Agentforce Specialist be aware of when using Record Snapshots grounding in a prompt template?
options: Activities such as tasks and events are excluded.
Email addresses associated with the object are excluded.
Empty data, such as fields without values or sections without limits, is filtered out.
explanation: Record Snapshots filtra datos vacíos y solo incluye campos con valores. Esto asegura que el grounding sea relevante y sin ruido para el modelo generativo.

question: Universal Containers (UC) needs to capture and store detailed interaction data for all agents. Which feature should help UC get a full view of the agent's behavior from start to finish, including reasoning engine executions, actions, prompt and gateway inputs/outputs, error messages, and final responses?
options: Agentforce Analytics
Utterance Analysis
Agentforce Session Tracing
explanation: Agentforce Session Tracing proporciona una vista completa del comportamiento del agente de principio a fin, incluyendo ejecuciones del reasoning engine, acciones, inputs/outputs del prompt y gateway, mensajes de error y respuestas finales. Es la herramienta mas detallada para analisis de sesiones de agente.

question:
Universal Containers has an active standard email prompt template that does not fully deliver on the business requirements. 
Which steps should an AI Specialist take to use the content of the standard prompt email template in question and customize it to fully meet the business requirements?
options: Save as New Template and edit as needed.
Clone the existing template and modify as needed.
Save as New Version and edit as needed.
explanation: El Testing Center en Agentforce Testing Center puede modificar datos CRM en producción si las pruebas se ejecutan en ese entorno, lo cual representa un riesgo real. Por eso se recomienda usar sandboxes para pruebas y comprender que las acciones del agente pueden tener efectos reales.

question: Universal Containers (UC) needs to assess Salesforce's generative AI features but has concerns over its company data being exposed to third-party large language models (LLMs). UC specifically wants: no data used for LLM training by third parties, no data retained outside of UC's Salesforce org, and the data sent cannot be accessed by the LLM provider. Which property of the Einstein Trust Layer should the Agentforce Specialist highlight?
options: Prompt Defense
Zero-Data Retention Policy
Data Masking
explanation: Zero-Data Retention Policy es la propiedad del Einstein Trust Layer que garantiza que ningun dato se use para entrenar modelos de terceros, que no se retenga fuera del org de Salesforce, y que el proveedor del LLM no pueda acceder a los datos enviados. Aborda directamente los tres requisitos de privacidad de UC.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants its AI agent to return responses quickly. UC needs to optimize the retriever's configuration to ensure minimal latency when grounding AI responses. Which configuration aspect should UC prioritize?
options: Increase the recency bias setting for the retriever limiting scope to more recent data.
Ensure the retriever’s filters are defined to limit the scope of each search efficiently.
Configure the retriever to operate in dynamic mode so that it modifies the search index structure at runtime.
explanation: Para minimizar latencia, priorice filtros retriever que reduzcan el scope de búsqueda. Esto limita datos irrelevantes y acelera la recuperación del contenido grounding.

question:
An AI Specialist implements Einstein Sales Emails for a sales team. The team wants to send personalized follow-up emails to leads based on their interactions and data stored in Salesforce. The AI Specialist needs to configure the system to use the most accurate and up-to-date information for email generation.
Which grounding technique should the AI Specialist use?
options: Ground with Apex Merge Fields
Ground with Record Merge Fields
Automatic grounding using Draft with Einstein feature
explanation: El retriever de Data Cloud realiza búsquedas contextuales sobre repositorios indexados para recuperar los documentos más relevantes que fundamentan las respuestas de la IA. No extrae datos brutos ni monitorea calidad; su función es la recuperación semántica para grounding.

question: Amid their busy schedules, sales reps at Universal Containers dedicate time to follow up with prospects and existing clients via email regarding renewals or new deals. They spend many hours reviewing past communications and details about their customers before performing outreach. Which standard Agent action helps draft personalized emails to prospects by generating text based on previous successful communications?
options: Agent Action: Draft or Revise Sales Email
Agent Action: Find Similar Opportunities
Agent Action: Summarize Record
explanation: Draft or Revise Sales Email genera emails personalizados de comunicaciones previas.

question: Coral Cloud Resorts wants visibility into credit usage associated with testing. Which feature supports this?
options: Agentforce Analytics
Digital Wallet
Testing Center
explanation: Digital Wallet es la funcionalidad de Salesforce que proporciona visibilidad sobre el uso de creditos de Agentforce, incluyendo los asociados a las pruebas. Permite monitorear el consumo de Einstein Requests y otros creditos de IA.

question:
The marketing team at Universal Containers is looking for a way to personalize emails based on customer behavior, preferences, and purchase history.
Why should the team use Einstein Agentforce or copilot  as the solution?
options: To generate relevant content when engaging with each customer
To analyze past campaign performance
To send automated emails to all customers
explanation: Call Insights proporciona visibilidad post-llamada sobre menciones de competidores, productos y frases personalizadas configurables. Esta función está diseñada específicamente para analizar conversaciones de ventas y extraer insights relevantes de manera automática.

question: The Agentforce Specialist for Cloud Kicks wants to create an agent that will allow the sales staff to schedule their daily tasks and assist in providing detailed explanations behind product prices and deals. Following Salesforce best practices, which type of agent should they create?
options: Service Agent
Employee Agent
Sales Agent
explanation: Sales Agent es el tipo correcto para ayudar al personal de ventas a programar tareas diarias y proporcionar explicaciones sobre precios y deals. Salesforce recomienda usar Sales Agent para flujos de trabajo especificos de ventas que involucran gestion de oportunidades y soporte al proceso de venta.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) has recently received an increased number of support cases. As a result, UC has hired more customer support reps and has started to assign some of the ongoing cases to newer reps. 
Which generative AI solution should the new support reps use to understand the details of a case without reading through each case comment?
options: Einstein Agentforce or copilot
Einstein Sales Summaries
Einstein Work Summaries
explanation: Einstein Work Summaries permite a los nuevos reps de soporte entender rápidamente los detalles de un caso sin leer todos los comentarios, resumiendo automáticamente el historial del caso. Einstein Sales Summaries es para ventas y Einstein Agentforce es una plataforma más amplia, no específicamente para resumir casos.

question: Universal Containers has grounded a prompt template with a related list. During user acceptance testing (UAT), users are not getting the correct responses. What is the most likely cause?
options: The related list is not configured in Data Cloud.
The related list is not on the parent object's page layout.
The related list merge field is not supported in this type of prompt template.
explanation: La causa mas probable es que la related list no este en el page layout del objeto padre. Para que los merge fields de related lists funcionen correctamente en un prompt template, la related list debe estar visible en el page layout del registro que se usa como contexto.

question:
Universal Containers wants to implement a solution in Salesforce with a custom UX that allows users to enter a sales order number. Subsequently, the system will invoke a custom prompt template to create and display a summary of the sales order header and sales order details. 
Which solution should an AI Specialist implement to meet this requirement?
options: Create a screen flow to collect sales order number and invoke the prompt template using the standard "Prompt Template" flow action.
Create a template-triggered prompt flow and invoke the prompt template using the standard “Prompt Template” flow action.
Create an autolaunched flow and invoke the prompt template using the standard “Prompt Template" flow action.
explanation: La acción Answer Questions with Knowledge utiliza Data Cloud para almacenar y gestionar los artículos de Knowledge indexados que el agente recupera para responder preguntas. Data Cloud es el repositorio centralizado que habilita la búsqueda semántica sobre los artículos de Knowledge.

question:
An AI Specialist is considering using a Fleld Generation prompt template type.
What should the AI Specialist check before creating the Field Generation prompt to ensure it is possible for the field to be enabled for generative AI?
options: That the field chosen must be a rich text field with 255 characters or more
That the org is set to API version 59 or higher
That the Lightning page layout where the field will reside has been upgraded to Dynamic Forms
explanation: Antes de crear un Field Generation prompt, la página Lightning donde residirá el campo debe estar actualizada a Dynamic Forms, que es el requisito previo para habilitar generación de campo con IA. El campo no necesita ser de texto enriquecido ni se requiere una versión específica de API para este propósito.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to enable its sales team to get insights into product and competitor names mentioned during calls. How should UC meet this requirement?
options: Enable Einstein Conversation Insights, assign permission sets, define recording managers, and customize insights with up to 50 competitor names.
Enable Einstein Conversation Insights, connect a recording provider, assign permission sets, and customize insights with up to 25 products.
Enable Einstein Conversation Insights, enable sales recording, assign permission sets, and customize insights with up to 50 products.
explanation: Para habilitar Einstein Conversation Insights con analisis de competidores y productos, se deben seguir estos pasos: habilitar la feature, asignar permission sets, definir recording managers y personalizar los insights con hasta 50 nombres de competidores. El limite de competidores es 50, no de productos.

question: An Agentforce Specialist wants to ensure their custom agent action performs as expected in conversations. What should the Agentforce Specialist focus on when creating action instructions?
options: Write concise agent action instructions and test in Agentforce Builder.
Ensure the agent action label matches the utterance's intent.
Include comprehensive detailed descriptions and perform smoke testing.
explanation: La mejor practica es escribir instrucciones de accion concisas y claras, y probarlas iterativamente en Agentforce Builder. Las instrucciones demasiado largas o detalladas pueden confundir al LLM; la concision y las pruebas iterativas son clave para un comportamiento correcto del agente.
